<think> I know that "Strictly Come Dancing" is a popular British television show where celebrities are paired with professional dancers and compete against each other. I also know that Tom Chambers is a British actor. I recall that the sixth season of the show was won by a celebrity who was paired with a professional dancer of a specific nationality. I'm trying to remember who that celebrity was and their partner's nationality... Ah, I think I have it! Tom Chambers was paired with Camilla Dallerup, a Danish professional dancer. </think>
<answer> Danish </answer>
